# Rustic array push showcase programs.
let xs = []; let i = 0; while i < 4 { xs = push(xs, i + 1); i = i + 1; }; xs[0] + xs[1] + xs[2] + xs[3] => 10
let xs = [2, 4]; let ys = push(xs, len(xs) + 4); len(xs) * 10 + len(ys) + ys[2] => 29
let xs = [1]; push(push(xs, 2), 3)[0] + push(push(xs, 2), 3)[1] + push(push(xs, 2), 3)[2] => 6
